title: Zanzibari Red Snapper Bowl
description: A flavorful and healthy bowl filled with pan-seared red snapper, Zanzibari spice, and steamed vegetables.
instructions: Season the red snapper fillets with salt, pepper, and Zanzibari spice.
Heat the melted butter in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the red snapper fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer to the oven.
Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, steam the sliced red bell pepper, carrots, and snow peas until tender.
To assemble the bowl, place a cooked red snapper fillet on the bottom, followed by a portion of the steamed vegetables.
